titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Janet Malcolm Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday October 20, 2018 at 03:01

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, audio cassettes, and other papers by, to, or relating to Janet Malcolm.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 55-58 (audiovisual material). Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings by others including correspondence with J.D. Salinger material and Philip Roth material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sylvia Plath and Ted Hughes, research material, drafts, correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sylvia Plath and Ted Hughes, research material, drafts, correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, writings by others, correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, research material, including a letter from Ted Hughs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, correspondence, writings by others, post cards.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, correspondence, writings by others, post cards.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, writings by others, correspondence, post cards.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, transcripts, various legal documents, corrected drafts, various writings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings including notes drafts and correspondence.

did.unittitle: Nudity, post office, pornography, piece on Penn.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, magazines, writings by others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, writings by others, transcripts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research material, writings by others, transcripts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drafts, notes, business files and proofs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drafts, research material, photographs, writings, correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drafts, research material, photographs, writings, correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drafts, notes and printed material that includes Gargoyle and The New Republic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence by fax and letter includes incoming and outgoing and additional materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence by fax and letter includes incoming and outgoing and additional materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence by fax and letter includes incoming and outgoing correspondence and additional materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings by others, drafts and research materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings by others, drafts and research materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings, drafts, interviews, notebooks and correspondence.

did.unittitle: The New York Review of Books

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Issues with contributions by Janet Malcom.

did.unittitle: Newspaper and magazine pages and clippings

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 55-58 (audiovisual material). Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
